subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: All things have qualities which are created with them—which are innate in them. The brilliance of the stars, the beauty of the trees
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station of the Manifestation of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @need for an educator, @knowledge; recognition of God
